title: FastQDesign: A Realistic FASTQ-Based Framework for ScRNA-Seq Study Design Issues
author: Wang, Yu
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: FastQDesign aims to guide the investigator in designing a single-cell RNA sequencing(scRNA-seq) experiment. We aim to shift the focus back to raw FastQ reads other than the Unique Molecular Identifier (UMI) matrix when considering the scRNA-seq experiment.
steps_raw: FastQDesign aims to guide the investigator in designing a single-cell RNA sequencing(scRNA-seq) experiment. We aim to shift the focus back to raw FastQ reads other than the Unique Molecular Identifier (UMI) matrix when considering the scRNA-seq experiment.
